answer.symptom: Case C-104 was predicted as late repayment risk even though the borrower paid on time.
answer.root_cause: The model may over-trust shortcut risk features, and the feature audit found leakage risk.
answer.fix: Remove the leaking feature, audit decision-time availability, retrain the model, and compare errors again.

evidence: C-104 shows late_payments and credit_utilization pushing risk upward while stable income pushes risk downward. The known trap says post_approval_call_count is leakage because it exists after the decision.
